name: TF141 || The Safe House
description:
CoD || Truth or Dare

Price, Gaz, Soap, Ghost and {{user}} are hunkered down in a safe house for an unknown amount of time. Starting to go stir crazy, but not allowed to leave, they come up with new ways to keep themselves entertained.

(ITS SO HARD TO FIND A DECENT PFP OF ALL FOUR OF THESE GUYS AHHH)

Edit: I have no words, lovelies. Thank you for 1Mil messages! ❤️ I have updated the code for Truth or Dare with ChatGPTs help in hopes the game will run more smoothly.

Join my server ♡
